Aisha evacuated all residents from the floor and conducted a sweep to ensure no one remained. Upon evacuation, Aisha observed visible smoke coming from Apartment 4C. Aisha called RUPD and the fire department at 3:23pm and kept all residents away from the building entrance. RUPD issued CAD number 26-25081. Aisha completed documentation and submitted the report. End of report.

Upon opening the door, the smell of marijuana intensified significantly. Marcus observed a grinder, rolling papers, and a jar of cannabis. Sandra acknowledged using cannabis in the room.
